screens.name: Dashboard
screens.purpose: This is a workspace dashboard screen designed to provide a quick overview of active projects, open tasks, and team members.

screens.name: Settings
screens.purpose: This is the Settings screen, which is used to manage workspace preferences like email notifications, security authentication, and dark mode display options.

screens.name: Billing
screens.purpose: This is the Billing screen, which allows users to view their current subscription plan and upgrade it.
